crime.value: Murder of Katrina Givossi by gunshot
crime.quote: Who was the one who pulled the trigger,who was it,I said sternly. ...Roger,he whispered

victim.value: Katrina Givossi, who was having an affair and betrayed her fiancé Roger
victim.quote: Tipper knew Katrina,they were like brother and sister,so who was the first person to tell when she wanted to get her affair

closed_world.value: Limited social circle of friends and family around Katrina - Roger, Tipper, Sampson, Hayley, and Gidd
closed_world.quote: Roger deserved more than her,he whispered,possibly to himself

culprit_and_motive.value: Roger Demillo killed Katrina for revenge after discovering she was having an affair with his friend Tipper
culprit_and_motive.quote: Roger Demillo,you are under arrest for the murder of Katrina Givossi

resolution.value: Detective interrogates suspects until Sampson confesses Roger pulled the trigger, leading to Roger's arrest
resolution.quote: Who was the one who pulled the trigger...Roger,he whispered,barely audible and slumped into the chair

investigator.value: Female detective Keiran working with partner Ryles to solve the murder through interrogation
investigator.quote: Oh c'mon Keiran,is being in an enclosed space with me so terrible.Yes,I replied

suspect_architecture.value: Five suspects with interconnected relationships: Tipper (alleged lover/friend), Sampson (graphic designer/forger), Hayley (alibi provider), Gidd (father with motive), Roger (ex-fiancé/actual killer). Each has means through access, motives through betrayal/revenge, opportunities through planned meetings.
suspect_architecture.quote: Roger deserved more than her,he whispered,possibly to himself.

red_herring.value: Fabricated cheating photos created by Sampson to frame Tipper as Katrina's affair partner, deliberately constructed to misdirect from the real motive of revenge for broken friendship and cancelled wedding.
red_herring.quote: Did you make those fluff cheating photos for Gidd,you do have use of programs on the computor

clue_fairness.value: The list of missing items and Roger's evasive response about their location, plus his failure to specify which 'buddy' provided his alibi - both clues available to reader before the revelation.
clue_fairness.quote: Yes when Roger said he was out at a buddy's place,he never mentioned who,Ryles said suspiciously.

social_world.value: Male friendship network where loyalty trumps honesty - Sampson protects Roger by creating false evidence, friends conspire against perceived betrayers, and masculine bonds justify deception and ultimately murder.
social_world.quote: Did Gidd pay you enough to bury your childhood friendship with Roger,I asked.

alibi.value: Tipper's alibi verified through Hayley Ross as his date at club NeNo, but Roger's alibi of being 'at a buddy's place' deliberately vague and ultimately false - he was planning murder with Sampson.
alibi.quote: I was at club NeNo on thursday night,ask Hayley Ross,she was my date,he explained.

reveal_mechanic.value: Confession extracted through systematic interrogation revealing the conspiracy: Sampson admits to photo forgery, then reveals Roger as the actual killer under pressure about their planned revenge meeting.
reveal_mechanic.quote: Who was the one who pulled the trigger,who was it,I said sternly....Roger,he whispered,barely audible

investigator_wound.value: Keiran's frustration with infidelity cases due to personal moral standards about cheating, creating emotional investment that could cloud professional judgment in a case involving alleged affairs.
investigator_wound.quote: Cases like these ones really pissed me off.Oh,I love them,but I can cheat,Hell no.
